cosmosHub.title: RPG "Conditional Cosmos"

cosmosHub.bmcHint: Osterwalder's 9 blocks: segments, value, ethical monetization
cosmosHub.storageNote: Data is stored locally in your browser. Team-wide sync will need a backend later.

AdminPersonality.title: Personality profile
AdminPersonality.subtitle: Layered profile concept for Medoyid Club: how we store traits, states, and interactions — without diagnoses or verdicts.
AdminPersonality.variantABody: The platform does not diagnose or advise. It shows a game projection and observations — people make their own decisions.
AdminPersonality.formula: Immutable tests → flat trait vector → state stream → visual layers
AdminPersonality.formulaDesc: Tests are protocols for filling the profile. Labels (“hyperthymic”, “ENFP”) are computed from numbers, not stored as truth.
AdminPersonality.layersSubtitle: Each layer changes at a different speed — separate data with separate access rules.

traits.title: Base traits (Big Five)
traits.example: Openness, conscientiousness, extraversion — foundation for all calculations.

radicals.title: Radicals
radicals.example: Histrionic, hyperthymic, schizoid — composite “hadrons” from traits, computed on the fly.

cognitive.title: Cognitive style
cognitive.example: MBTI-like axes as another protocol for the same vector.

state.title: Current state
state.example: Separate check-in stream, not a static profile field.

roles.title: Social roles
roles.example: Friendship, work, relationships — goal mode shifts synergy weights.

principles.1: Raw data is immutable: each test run is an immutable record.
principles.2: Value is in graph edges, not nodes: compatibility is a per-layer vector, not one number.
principles.3: Courses feed the profile: lesson → test → new layer → next course recommendation.
principles.4: Dark matter is honest uncertainty, not hidden magic.

AdminPersonality.horizonsSubtitle: Phased path from MVP to social RPG.

learning.title: Horizon 1 · Profile as learning artifact
learning.subtitle: MVP
learning.body: Big Five test, layered profile “stack”, empty layers as progression through courses.

edges.title: Horizon 2 · Interactions as data
edges.subtitle: Synergy
edges.body: Per-layer compatibility, message translator as hypothesis, communication trainer.

teams.title: Horizon 3 · Teams and map
teams.subtitle: Social layer
teams.body: Team composition, pseudo-locations, quests as activities affecting progression.

events.title: Horizon 4 · Event typing
events.subtitle: Event sourcing
events.body: Daily events change only state; rare events may shift traits.

AdminPersonality.ctaBody: Interactive prototype: pick a radical, artifact, and second character — see stats and synergy profile in real time.

playground.title: Interactive sandbox
playground.subtitle: Take tests, unlock profile layers, complete quests, and earn rewards. Data is stored in the browser (team demo).
playground.progressDesc: Each layer unlocks via tests, check-ins, or quests — as in the vision MVP.
playground.bigFiveDesc: 10 questions, scale 1–5. Result fills the bottom profile layer.

bigFive.bf_ext_1: I find it easy to start conversations with strangers.
bigFive.bf_ext_2: I prefer to stay in the background at events.
bigFive.bf_opn_1: I enjoy new ideas and unconventional approaches.
bigFive.bf_opn_2: I feel more comfortable sticking to familiar solutions.
bigFive.bf_con_1: I try to finish what I start.
bigFive.bf_con_2: Order and planning are hard for me.
bigFive.bf_agr_1: I care about other people's feelings.
bigFive.bf_agr_2: In conflict I defend my position rather than compromise.
bigFive.bf_neu_1: I often worry about small things.
bigFive.bf_neu_2: I handle stress and uncertainty calmly.

playground.radicalsDesc: 7 situational questions — your game character class.

radicalsQ.rad_q3: When an unconventional decision is needed…

playground.checkinDesc: Top layer — ephemeral state, separate event stream.
playground.questsDesc: Learning and social activities unlock layers and rewards.

traits_intro.title: First protocol: Big Five
traits_intro.desc: Lock in the base layer after the test.

radicals_lesson.title: Lesson: seven radicals
radicals_lesson.desc: Open the middle layer and earn Plato's Cloak.

cognitive_intro.title: Cognitive style
cognitive_intro.desc: Mini-course on thinking styles — opens layer and Aristotle's Ring.

social_flashmob.title: Social flash mob
social_flashmob.desc: Safe group activity — roles layer and Stoic Shield.

playground.rewardsDesc: Medals and items affect game stats in Honey Club.

AdminHoneyClub.title: Honey Club — social RPG engine
AdminHoneyClub.subtitle: Live prototype: radical → game stats → synergy between people. Numbers are formula-driven.
AdminHoneyClub.variantABody: No diagnoses, no advice, no verdicts — only game projection and observations.
AdminHoneyClub.architectureSubtitle: Universal model defines ontology; layer pipeline turns type into game.
AdminHoneyClub.pipelineHint: Highlighted layers are already computed live in this prototype.
AdminHoneyClub.labSubtitle: Pick a class and artifact — stats recalculate from formulas.
AdminHoneyClub.observationBody: Most salient for this goal: {metrics}. Watch friction risk: {conflict}.
AdminHoneyClub.observationDisclaimer: This is a game observation, not advice or a judgment of people.
AdminHoneyClub.useMyProfileHint: Complete tests on the Personality profile page first
AdminHoneyClub.footnote: Illustrative model (Ponomarenko radicals × Big Five). Weights are hypotheses for calibration. Not a diagnostic tool.

roadmap.noTasksToday: No active tasks on the chart today.

roadmap.contextBody: Prep plan for the Conditional Cosmos RPG: three streams start in parallel (market, design, TWM). Honey Club courses are not included. The "Start development" milestone follows the PoC (Gates + first Tree).

bmc.pickBlockForLinks: Select another block to see links.
